creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Looking at the port Makefile can be very enlightening: 

# Note: this port cannot be built when the textproc/mswordview port is 
# already installed, due to header file conflicts and the very broken 
# AbiWord build system. 

ie: the problem is known.  Since there are no patches here to fix 
the problem, there's no reason to keep the PR open.
